name: Appliance
description_short: Appliance Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with 24/7 digital access via mobile app and online banking.
description_long:
Appliance Credit Union has served its members since 1972 as a federally insured credit union committed to providing financial benefits to members. The institution operates as a traditional credit union with physical branches and digital-first services, emphasizing member convenience and competitive rates.

ACU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including share draft (checking) accounts, savings accounts, VISA credit cards, vehicle loans (new and used), mortgage loans, personal loans up to $15,000, and signature loans. Members can access accounts through Internet Teller (online banking), the ACU Mobile App available on iOS and Android, and in-person at branches. Digital services include remote deposit capture, fund transfers between ACU and external accounts, e-statements, account alerts, and secure messaging.

Appliance CU differentiates itself through member-centric features like Courtesy Pay service (automatic overdraft protection for qualifying members), a loan skip payment option ($25/month to skip up to 2 payments annually), and a rewards program. The institution emphasizes security with industry-standard encryption and biometric login options (Touch ID/Face ID), plus purchase protection on credit cards. As a credit union rather than a bank, ACU provides member governance and typically lower fees.

The main limitation is that membership appears restricted (likely to specific employee groups or geographic areas based on the name), and the website provides limited detail on specific loan rates, APRs, or account fee structures. The institution closed Friday hours effective January 1, 2024, requiring members to use mobile app services for weekend banking needs.
services: Share draft (checking) accounts with Courtesy Pay overdraft protection
Savings accounts with federal NCUA insurance
ACU Mobile App for 24/7 account access and management
Remote deposit capture via mobile app
Vehicle loans (new and used) with stated great rates
Personal loans and signature loans up to $15,000
Appliance Credit Union VISA credit cards with rewards and purchase protection
Loan skip payment program ($25/month to defer up to 2 payments yearly)
Fund transfers between ACU and external financial institutions
Account alerts, notifications, and secure member messaging
pros: Free ACU Mobile App with 24/7 account access, remote deposit capture, and biometric login (Touch ID/Face ID)
Signature loans up to $15,000 for qualifying members over 60-month terms
Automatic Courtesy Pay overdraft protection for members in good standing with 3+ month account history
Loan skip payment option allowing up to 2 monthly skips per year for $25/month fee
Federal deposit insurance through National Credit Union Administration (NCUA)
Ability to transfer funds between ACU and external financial institutions via mobile app
Rewards program and purchase protection on VISA cards
cons: Limited membership eligibility (appears restricted to specific groups; not clear from public website)
Website does not display specific loan rates or APRs, requiring contact with institution for pricing
Friday branch hours reduced to 5 PM effective January 2024, limiting in-person access
No mention of fee structure for accounts, loans, or services on publicly available content
Limited information about mortgage or business lending products compared to other financial institutions
best_for: Credit union members seeking integrated digital and branch banking with strong mobile access
Borrowers needing vehicle, personal, or mortgage loans from a member-owned institution
Individuals wanting overdraft protection and flexible loan payment options
Members of specific employee groups or communities eligible for ACU membership
diagnosis: Appliance Credit Union is best for individuals who are eligible members seeking a full-service credit union with strong digital banking capabilities and competitive lending rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is not publicly detailed on the website, suggesting restricted access (likely employer or community-based), and specific loan rates and fee structures are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact with the institution.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Appliance — Credit Union in CLEVELAND, TN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Appliance — NCUA-insured credit union in CLEVELAND, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
